metadata.description: Claude Code utility plugins for development, architecture, auditing, documentation, market research, and CC meta-skills

plugins.name: python-dev
plugins.description: Python implementation, testing, code review skills, and scaffold adapter for Ralph loop

plugins.name: commit-helper
plugins.description: Generate conventional commit messages and pull requests with approval workflow

plugins.name: codebase-tools
plugins.description: Isolated codebase research and exploration via subagent

plugins.name: cc-meta
plugins.description: Claude Code meta-skills for cross-project synthesis, context compaction, session intelligence, and memory seed template

plugins.name: backend-design
plugins.description: Backend system architecture and API design skills

plugins.name: mas-design
plugins.description: Multi-agent system plugin design and OWASP MAESTRO security framework

plugins.name: website-audit
plugins.description: Website design research, usability audit, and WCAG accessibility audit skills

plugins.name: docs-generator
plugins.description: Document generation for writeups, tech specs (ADR/RFC/design docs), and reports with pandoc PDF output

plugins.name: ralph
plugins.description: PRD-to-JSON conversion, interactive user story builder, and PRD generation for the Ralph loop

plugins.name: embedded-dev
plugins.description: Embedded firmware development with CE/FCC compliance, ESP-IDF/PlatformIO, requirement traceability, and KiCad PCB auditing

plugins.description: Deploys workspace rules, statusline, governance files, base settings, and read-once deduplication hook

plugins.description: Deploys workspace rules, statusline script, eased sandbox settings, and read-once deduplication hook

plugins.name: docs-governance
plugins.description: Audit and maintain documentation hierarchy and agent governance files

plugins.name: market-research
plugins.description: GTM market research pipeline with teams mode parallel dispatch and configurable 2x2 strategy matrix

plugins.name: rust-dev
plugins.description: Rust implementation, testing, and code review skills, deploys cargo permissions via SessionStart hook

plugins.name: go-dev
plugins.description: Go implementation, testing, and code review skills, deploys go tool permissions via SessionStart hook

plugins.name: gha-dev
plugins.description: Skills and rules for creating GitHub Actions for the Marketplace

plugins.name: tdd-core

plugins.name: cc-voice
plugins.description: E2E voice — TTS via PTY proxy (/speak), STT via Moonshine (/listen, planned). Prototype, git submodule.

plugins.name: typescript-dev
